summary: Set 068 Session 2 of 6: Experiment A symmetric re-grade + Experiment B pre-registration (analysis/design only; NO production code, NO release). Ran on claude-opus-4-8 high (operator confirmed at the S2 boundary to stay on opus over the routed sonnet rec, on statistical-honesty grounds). (1) SYMMETRIC RE-GRADE: applied the SAME strict quoted-mechanism audit the Set 067 routed audit used one-directionally to the path-aware (B1/B2) x cross-file catches (experiment-a-regrade/audit-symmetric.json + reproducible regrade.py over committed Set 067 raw; evidence dump pathaware-crossfile-evidence.md). Exactly ONE removal, B1:D12 (token spillover from the D9 finding; B1 never names the isidentifier single-arg mechanism; B2:D12 kept). Result: cross-file strict survival routed 2/8 vs path-aware 13/14 under the IDENTICAL rule. Contrasts: GPT B1-A1 EXCEEDS band under EVERY regime incl the audit-free automated primary (+0.2315) and the sym mechanism-audited replicate-mean (+0.2870); Gemini B2-A2 is INSIDE the band under the pre-registered automated primary (+0.0833<0.111) but RESOLVES to +0.2778 once routed's wrong-mechanism cross-file credit is removed at the replicate level - the Gemini effect was MASKED, not absent. Corrected the 0.21.1 erratum: only D5 is a FULLY audit-independent existence proof (routed never matched it); D9 is audit-CONDITIONAL (routed automated-matched a docstring-subset nitpick). H1 direction CONFIRMED audit-independent; H2 'second routed provider adds nothing' robust/audit-independent, the +0.31 union magnitude downgraded to exploratory. (2) EXPERIMENT B PRE-REGISTRATION: staged-snapshot cadence intervention. Mechanism: a coupling defect is in-snippet@introduction but MIGRATES to cross-file@close, giving per-session routed its one strong-window shot. Arms R(per-session routed=status quo)/E(end-of-set path-aware=replacement)/Q(end-of-set routed=PURE cadence control)/P(optional). Three pre-registered axes (coupling_depth x vis_at_intro x vis_at_close_for_Q) -> cadence-payoff / coupling-blind / always-visible / no-coupling(null). Pre-committed deterministic rework cost_model.py (ships w/ invariant self-tests, PASS) separates empirical catch-timing from fixed rework. Falsifiable decision rule (holds/does-not-hold/unresolved) on PER-REPEAT metrics with a binding >=2/3 realized-early-catch stability gate, a single pinned noise-band rule (band = across-K range of the per-repeat contrast X_k; mean_k authoritative, median sign-check only), and null checks on the no-coupling AND always-visible controls. Q's surface pinned as Q_surface_files everywhere (classification == the executed Q run). Pilot gate before paid sweep (L-067-3); L-067-1 GPT mitigations recorded. VERIFICATION: gpt-5.4 (high) R1 ISSUES_FOUND (1 Minor floor-overclaim + 2 Major: Exp B union-primary not stability-binding + imprecise band; missing vis_at_close_for_Q) -> remediated all (computed sym-audited replicate means; per-repeat binding stability gate; vis_at_close_for_Q axis + always-visible control + min counts) -> R2 (Finding1 RESOLVED; 2/3 PARTIAL: median binding w/o band, Q surface contradictory) -> remediated (unified per-repeat contrast X_k band rule, mean authoritative; Q=Q_surface_files everywhere) -> R3 VERIFIED (1 Minor 'equivalently' wording fixed). Full ai_router suite GREEN 1548 passed / 1 skipped (unchanged; no ai_router/ change). ~$0.603.

reason.specifics: Routed analysis (route task_type=analysis) recommends claude-sonnet-4-6/medium for Session 3 ('Experiment B - the cadence study'): substantial-but-well-defined harness production code + a metered K=3 two-provider sweep + statistical-honesty analysis, all against the design pre-registered this session - capable work for sonnet-class at lower cost than opus. Explicitly avoids gpt-5.4 as ORCHESTRATOR (L-067-1 budget exhaustion as a loop driver), preserving gpt-5.4 + gemini-2.5-pro as the two experiment SUBJECT providers and the cross-provider verifier. CAVEAT for the S3 operator: the same statistical-honesty weighting that kept S2 on opus may apply to S3's analysis step; the decision is the operator's to confirm at the S3 boundary.
